# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Rails mailer class that sends emails via SendGrid. Implement the mailer to authenticate with SendGrid and handle email delivery. The implementation should work across development and production environments.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Load secrets from environment variables or a secret manager rather than embedding them in code.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Store secrets only in platform-provided secure storage or a proper secret manager.
- Minimize persistence of sensitive data and avoid plaintext storage.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not store credentials, tokens, or encryption keys in plaintext application storage.
- Do not hardcode secrets in source code.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

# config/initializers/sendgrid.rb
ActionMailer::Base.smtp_settings = {
  user_name: 'apikey',
  password: ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_API_KEY'),
  domain: ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_DOMAIN', 'example.com'),
  address: 'smtp.sendgrid.net',
  port: 587,
  authentication: :plain,
  enable_starttls_auto: true
}

# app/mailers/application_mailer.rb
class ApplicationMailer < ActionMailer::Base
  default from: ENV.fetch('MAILER_DEFAULT_FROM', 'noreply@example.com')
  layout 'mailer'
end

# app/mailers/sendgrid_mailer.rb
class SendgridMailer < ApplicationMailer
  # Generic email sending method
  def send_email(to:, subject:, body:, from: nil, reply_to: nil, cc: nil, bcc: nil, attachments_list: nil, template_id: nil, dynamic_template_data: nil)
    @body = body
    @dynamic_template_data = dynamic_template_data

    # Add attachments if provided
    if attachments_list.present?
      attachments_list.each do |attachment|
        attachments[attachment[:filename]] = {
          mime_type: attachment[:mime_type],
          content: attachment[:content]
        }
      end
    end

    headers['X-SMTPAPI'] = build_smtpapi_header(template_id: template_id, dynamic_template_data: dynamic_template_data).to_json if template_id.present?

    mail_options = {
      to: to,
      subject: subject,
      from: from || self.class.default[:from]
    }

    mail_options[:reply_to] = reply_to if reply_to.present?
    mail_options[:cc] = cc if cc.present?
    mail_options[:bcc] = bcc if bcc.present?

    mail(mail_options) do |format|
      format.html { render html: @body.html_safe }
      format.text { render plain: strip_tags(@body) }
    end
  end

  # Welcome email
  def welcome_email(user)
    @user = user
    @login_url = ENV.fetch('APP_URL', 'http://localhost:3000') + '/login'

    add_sendgrid_categories(['welcome', 'onboarding'])
    add_sendgrid_unique_args({ user_id: user.id })

    mail(
      to: @user.email,
      subject: 'Welcome to Our Platform'
    )
  end

  # Password reset email
  def password_reset_email(user, reset_token)
    @user = user
    @reset_url = ENV.fetch('APP_URL', 'http://localhost:3000') + "/password_reset?token=#{reset_token}"

    add_sendgrid_categories(['password_reset', 'transactional'])

    mail(
      to: @user.email,
      subject: 'Password Reset Instructions'
    )
  end

  # Notification email
  def notification_email(to:, subject:, message:, category: 'notification')
    @message = message

    add_sendgrid_categories([category, 'notification'])

    mail(
      to: to,
      subject: subject
    )
  end

  # Batch email using SendGrid's SMTPAPI
  def batch_email(recipients:, subject:, body:, categories: [])
    @body = body

    smtpapi_header = {
      'to' => recipients
    }
    smtpapi_header['category'] = categories if categories.present?

    headers['X-SMTPAPI'] = smtpapi_header.to_json

    mail(
      to: ENV.fetch('MAILER_DEFAULT_FROM', 'noreply@example.com'),
      subject: subject
    ) do |format|
      format.html { render html: @body.html_safe }
      format.text { render plain: strip_tags(@body) }
    end
  end

  private

  def add_sendgrid_categories(categories)
    @sendgrid_categories ||= []
    @sendgrid_categories.concat(Array(categories))
    update_smtpapi_header
  end

  def add_sendgrid_unique_args(args)
    @sendgrid_unique_args ||= {}
    @sendgrid_unique_args.merge!(args)
    update_smtpapi_header
  end

  def update_smtpapi_header
    smtpapi = {}
    smtpapi['category'] = @sendgrid_categories if @sendgrid_categories.present?
    smtpapi['unique_args'] = @sendgrid_unique_args if @sendgrid_unique_args.present?
    headers['X-SMTPAPI'] = smtpapi.to_json if smtpapi.present?
  end

  def build_smtpapi_header(template_id: nil, dynamic_template_data: nil)
    header = {}
    header['filters'] = {
      'templates' => {
        'settings' => {
          'enable' => 1,
          'template_id' => template_id
        }
      }
    } if template_id.present?

    header['dynamic_template_data'] = dynamic_template_data if dynamic_template_data.present?
    header
  end

  def strip_tags(html)
    ActionController::Base.helpers.strip_tags(html)
  end
end

# config/environments/development.rb additions (to be merged into existing file)
# Rails.application.configure do
#   config.action_mailer.delivery_method = :smtp
#   config.action_mailer.perform_deliveries = true
#   config.action_mailer.raise_delivery_errors = true
#   config.action_mailer.default_url_options = { host: 'localhost', port: 3000 }
# end

# config/environments/production.rb additions (to be merged into existing file)
# Rails.application.configure do
#   config.action_mailer.delivery_method = :smtp
#   config.action_mailer.perform_deliveries = true
#   config.action_mailer.raise_delivery_errors = false
#   config.action_mailer.default_url_options = { host: ENV.fetch('APP_HOST') }
# end
